title: Mishaps
questions: Are you clumsy?
Do you often spill things?
Have you ever spilt something on someone?
Do you often bump into things?
Have you ever broken something valuable?
Have you ever broken something on purpose?
What do you say when you bump into someone in crowded place?
Have you ever had a broken bone? How did you break it?
Have you ever been in a car accident? What happened?
Have you ever had a bump on your head?
Have you ever spent time in the hospital for an operation?
Have you ever taken someone else's things by mistake?
Have you ever been lost? Where were you?
Have you ever lost a wallet, purse, or something important?
Are you forgetful?
Do you usually remember your family and friends' birthdays?
Have you ever forgotten an important promise?
Have you ever left the water running?
Have you ever forgotten to lock the door?
Do you make silly mistakes when you write tests?
Do you usually double-check your answers?
Have you ever gotten off at the wrong stop on the subway or bus?
What do you say when somebody calls your house by accident?
Has someone ever mistaken you for someone else?
